title: Malam Tujuh Likur Memory
description: A memory of preparations and lights before Hari Raya.
story_context: The contributor recalls preparing lamps and gathering with neighbours during Malam Tujuh Likur in the days before Hari Raya.

title: Sea Route Between Islands
description: A remembered route used for movement between islands and mainland Singapore.
story_context: The contributor describes travelling between islands by boat, navigating tides, currents, and weather conditions as part of everyday life.
